title: Roofing Atlas Query Intelligence
subtitle: Public-safe local roofing AI-query examples and schemas.
description: A public-safe technical dataset for mapping sanitized homeowner prompts and observed AI-search query language to broad local roofing education themes. Governed by Inspector Roofing Protocols™ as a pending USPTO trademark application, Serial No. 99910245. This release excludes customer records, private images, exact addresses, full photo manifests, API keys, claim files, receipts, contracts, and proprietary scoring rules.
